reviews.text:
A True Advocate and Lifesaver

I can’t express enough gratitude for the incredible work Nick Davis did in helping me bring my nephew home from foster care. From our very first conversation, he was not only knowledgeable and professional but also deeply compassionate and understanding of how emotional and difficult this journey was for our family.

Nick and Tracy, his paralegal, walked me through every step of the legal process with clarity and confidence, always making time to answer my questions and calm my fears. What stood out most was how fiercely they advocated for my nephew’s best interests—not just legally, but humanely. It never felt like just another case to them.

Thanks to Nick Davis Law Firm, my nephew is now safe and surrounded by family. I will always be thankful for their dedication, expertise, and genuine heart. If you’re looking for someone who truly cares and will fight for your family like it’s their own, this is the lawyer you want by your side.

Nick and his law firm worked tirelessly with the help of God and gave me my life back. As an healthcare provider was falsely accused of abuse. Even when I was worried, I was assured not to. This experience would forever changed me. Am grateful to God and this knowledgeable incredible law firm.
Thank you and 🙏🙏🙏

He was an absolute godsend who saved my family from the clutches, horrors, abuse and deceptions of the Department of Anti-Family and Persecuting Services. I had a crucial 6-day trial and we had a unanimous win from 12 jurors! I owe a lot of this to how he has strategized, quick to notice nuances and details and make the right judgment calls, and the way he preps in a fast moving situation from the beginning to the end. Really couldn't have done this intensive case without him. He has gone out of his way to help and in the end turned what would have been a terrible tragedy around! All the reviews written about him here and Avvo are true and more. I'm definitely glad he's not a judge just yet to represent me and practically saved us. Please hire him if you ever find yourself in trouble. He'll help you like no one else can.
The Nick Davis law firm is one of the best I've used, and I use a lot. He was able to provide me with a win. I highly recommend this law office to represent you.
reviews.ownerResponse: Romeo, thanks for letting us know.  Glad we were able to help. You take care.  - Nick

reviews.text: Top-notch lawyer. Responsive ,trustworthy and understanding
Nick was very helpful and professional during my divorce and gave great advice.
Awesome service highly recommend!!!

I had a custody scare at 10pm. I had received some mail from the attorney General saying that my ex was now the custodial parent and I was freaking out because I didn't know what had happened or if it was even true. I texted nick telling him my situation at 10pm! And 5 minutes later he called me and looked up my case to find out that there were actually no changes and that the attorney General made a mistake on the mail I received. It was a big scare to me at the time but I slept east that night thanks to nick answering me late at night and helping get to the bottom of this situation. Thanks again nick, when the time comes ill definitely be using you! You showed me night or day you can get it done quickly and professionally and I appreciate you greatly.

I've known Nick for 16 years. Nick and I went to law school together and since graduating, have collaborated on several cases where our mutual clients' issues involved both family and tax issues. I've always known Nick to handle our mutual clients with the greatest care, skill, and diligence possible. He's handled very complex cases and achieved great results for his clients.  I would highly recommend anyone that is in need of a family law attorney to contact Nick Davis.

If you need a “go to” law firm to handle a lawsuit or a business transaction, look no further than Woodall Batchelor. I mostly use Dan and Charles to review / draft all of my contracts and transactional work because they know their stuff, do great work, and are very responsive. However, they also handled a litigation matter for and achieved a great result. Highly recommend Woodall Batchelor.

Conner Lee was our first rep for the law group and was very nice and personable.  This was our first experience seeking representation for our car accident,  and he and Mary Beth were aceptional in explaining the process to my husband and I.  Greg Lee was also patient and explained everything thoroughly. Our case was finalized just yesterday and we're very happy with the results.   Thank you to the entire law office.

Mr Gregory and his team work hard
for their clients they will work to get your case handled like know other.
For my first time and the length Mr. Lee and his law firm helped me in all ways possible. They were extraordinary and always went  above and beyond! Highly recommend!!

Went to Lee Law 3 years ago after my wife and I were in a car accident. Am happy to report that it all came to an end yesterday and both my wife and I are more than satisfied. The concern and professionalism shown by this complete organization is beyond compare. In the event that you should need a personal injury attorney, this is the place to go.

My wife and I hired Lee Law to represent us in a personal injury claim after an accident, and we were satisfied with their services and the outcome.  Mr. Lee, his son Connor, and their extended staff were incredibly responsive, getting us set up with medical and rehabilitation services the very next day, a very important aspect.

The insurance company was extremely difficult to deal with, often unreasonable and dismissive, but the entire Lee Law team worked diligently and collaboratively in our best interest.

Everyone we interacted with was friendly, professional, and genuinely cared about our well-being. Their office space is also comfortable and welcoming, which made our visits pleasant. We absolutely recommend Lee Law to anyone in need of strong, compassionate legal representation.

I had such a great experience with the Law Office of Gregory P. Lee, especially working with Conner Lee. From day one he was super responsive, always calling me back quick and explaining things so I could actually understand them. You can tell he really knows his stuff and cared about my case, not just like another file on the desk. He kept me updated every step of the way and made me feel like I wasn’t going through this alone. Very professional but also just a real down to earth guy. If you ever need a lawyer that actually listens and fights for you, I would 100% recommend Conner and his team.

Gregory Lee &  Conner were great to work with and helped me with my first big accident where my car was hit at a stop light from behind. The case took some time and they reminded me of this and were honest and hard working. Conner handled my case and was available when I needed him and had questions. If he was busy, he’d reply with a text almost right away to keep me updated on calling back. I can tell he truly cares about his clients and Mr. Gregory was there to answer any further questions or concerns to reassure me that everything will be okay. They recommended great care for me for PT and scans needed and worked with my location to ensure it was all convenient for me. Thank you so much for spending the time to help me solve my case and doing your best for me. Their team was also very responsive via emails and phone calls. Thank you and I’ll highly recommend!

- Kathy  Lee
The best law firm I've ever seen, coming from someone who has used them twice.

Mr. Lee is well-organized, honest and hard working.  His staff is very cordial and helpful.  I am very pleased with the way he handled my case.  The case was settled to my satisfaction and the recovery he was able to obtain greatly exceeded my expectations.

Great representation in my accident case. Very informative from beginning to end and easy to contact anytime. I highly recommend this firm. Gregory Lee, Mary Beth and staff were amazing and professional. Thank you guys! A++

In Jan 2023 I was involved in a chain reaction car accident caused by another car.  Since this was not a fender bender, I asked around for a recommended lawyer and was given the Law office of Gregory Lee.   It was apparent at our first meeting with Mr. Lee we knew that his team was going to be the best advocate for me and my case.  The first thing they did after the initial meeting was to recommended a great PT that helped me recover and kept me in the loop at every turn of our case.  20 months later the accident was resolved and I have been able to move on with my life.  They are there with you from the start to the end.  I will always keep them in mind if someone ask for a recommendation for a great lawyer.

Consummate professionals. Aggressive, responsive, and results-oriented firm.

Cannot recommend this team enough.
Greg and his staff are awesome. They really care about their clients and  cases. We appreciate all of the work you all have done for us in helping with our car wreck and getting the best outcome.
Our attorney Conner was efficient, polite and timely. I would highly recommend this law office.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to leave us a review, Chanelle.  We sincerely appreciate your kind words.

reviews.text: Connor Lee helped me even when i thought my situation was helpless. He was very thorough and kept me updated through every step of the way.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Gabriela.  We sincerely appreciate you taking the time to leave us a review.  We hope to always meet and/or exceed our clients' expectations.

reviews.text:
OMG!! Where do I even start?
April 1, 2022- I was hit by a truck that ran a red light; he totaled my vehicle and a third-party’s vehicle. It changed my whole life‘s narrative. I worked hard to get the vehicle. I worked hard to get my credit up to get approved for it. I worked hard to be able to pay my monthly notes on it and I lost it all. I’ve never been forced back to square one so fast and sudden before. I’m not an easy person to acquire my trust from; nor have I ever been in a lawsuit before, I’m very picky about who’s in my life, let alone my legal team. I hunted for lawyers, calling & holding conversation after conversation with multiple attorneys, asking questions and when I found Mr. Gregory’s Law Firm, I called and spoke to Mr. Conner Lee first, (which is Mr. Gregory’s son). He helped me get the whole process started, he offered the options to meet up or over the phone, I did choose to meet in person at a local café, he asked all necessary questions he explained everything down to the “T”; even if he thought it was something simple to him he made sure I understood everything. My case took 1 year & 6 months to fully close out, Mr. Gregory would called me personally when needed and explained any steps necessary and also explain future steps necessary. The phone was always answered when I called. Mrs. Mary Beth was also a major asset through this new experience, she called and informed or helped me with whatever it was whether it was pleasant to my ears or not. They all took their time helping me understand or walking me through the process of anything we needed to do. They make a game plan to help yourself get back to where you were or even a little bit further than where you were. I was always worried about acquiring a lawyer who was only in it for themself and their check, but I can promise you wholeheartedly Mr. Gregory Lee fights for you, his whole team does. I thought I was going to get a little $5,000-$10,000 check and after 1 year and 6 months of fighting for me, exercising his intelligence, making a game plan and being there for you as if y’all been friends your whole life…… at 24 years old my first major accident, my first major setback, my first major lawsuit….. I walk away with a $30,000 check. Even after everybody learned how much they were getting paid they still treated me as if I were just starting the process. I got to come in, meet everyone & sit down to be explained the charges made, the medical bills getting paid from the settlement & what’s owed to me without me having to hassle them to do so. I wish he was a lawyer for everyday possible situations in life. I’m not the type to put my business out there but I always felt the respect and gratitude with this Law Firm. I want to give a big shout out to Mr. Gregory Lee, Mrs. Mary Beth & Mr. Conner Lee, God bless you all. The best team I’ve ever laid my eyes on, I'm big on respect and actions. If anybody ends up in a predicament like I was in; I will always say be cautious, but I will say you can't go wrong picking this team, they will be your team. God bless & Good luck to all!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words, Ashley.  We sincerely appreciate you taking the time to leave this review and for trusting us with your case.  There is nothing more rewarding than having a happy and satisfied client.

reviews.text: Mr Lee & his staff especially Gina Ramirez was professional, kind & honest.i got more than I expected.if you looking for an Attorney look no farther he's your man.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Sharon.  We sincerely appreciate you taking the time to leave us a review and we appreciate your kind words.

reviews.text: Greg and his staff were amazing! They kept in contact to let us know how our case was going. Always friendly and helpful. I would definitely recommend him to any of my family and friends if they have a legal problem. We view him as a friend, not just our attorney. Very easy to talk to, love him and his staff!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Mrs. Witt.  It was certainly a pleasure representing you and Mr. Witt.  I really appreciate you taking the time to leave us a review, and I wish you all the best.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Ms. Henderson!  It was a pleasure representing you again.

reviews.text: Mr. Lee helped me a ton after being rear-ended a few years ago. He got me the money I needed to pay for my physical therapy and more. Seriously saved my health.
reviews.ownerResponse: We truly appreciate you for trusting our firm to help you with your case and also for taking the time to leave us a review.  It was a pleasure working with you.

reviews.text: Mr. Lee and his entire staff are amazing.  He is so compassionate and  a very skilled litigator.  I have worked with many attorneys but few rise  to his level of competence.  I highly recommend his firm to anyone in need of these type of services.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Mr. Kimberly.  I enjoyed working with you and your wife, and I am grateful you trusted my firm to help with both accident cases.

reviews.text:
These guys are amazing.

In the fall of 2021 I was in a serious (not at fault) motorcycle wreck.

TLDR: a guy pulled blindly out in front of me sending me directly into his side at 45mph with zero time to slow down.

After the wreck I tried to work with the at fault guys insurance to get my surgery costs and time off work compensated at least, but every step of the way they added more and more confusing paper work, they weren't even planning on any thing beyond "equal expense" compensation.

At that point I needed help actually dealing with all the mess, I originally chose Greg Lee's Office because of the closeness to my home and how clean their website was, but I'm honestly so glad I chose this Law Office.

Day ONE they were able to get me an Order of Protection so I could immediately start physical therapy for my leg and shoulder at no cost to me.

It took just over a year to get my settlement but thanks to this office I was able to not only get all my medical bills taken of, but a little pain and suffering on top.

I really can't thank/recommend Greg Lee's Office ENOUGH!

-Samuel H
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for trusting my firm to help you with this matter, and nothing makes me happier than hearing we exceeded your expectations.  We wish you nothing but the best.

reviews.text: Thank you Conner for helping me after my wreck! He broke things down for me step by step throughout the whole process. 10/10 recommend!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Shelby.  We appreciate you taking the time to leave us a review.  We are very happy you were satisfied with our service and would recommend our firm to others.  It means the world to us.

reviews.text: Big shout out to Conner!  He was very fast at replying and answering all of my questions. Soon after my wreck, he was able to coordinate physical therapy for me and kept checking in to make sure I was feeling better!  I would absolutely reach out to him again in the future!

Mr. Lee and his team was a tremendous help. They were there when I needed help. They were attentive and always answered my calls. When they were unable to answer my questions they advised me they would find out the answer for me and get back to me. They always responded in a timely manner with the answer.  I would recommend them to everyone! Awesome firm!
-AC-
Went very smooth, and everyone is very nice to work with

I can literally write a book about Mr. Greg and his law firm. But I will spare you the details. Just know that if you’re here, you’re in the right place and you NEED him on your side! God forbid, but I would never consider a different injury attorney for myself or my family before calling him, ever!
Very professional and knowledgeable. Jennifer and her team are always available to answer all your legal questions. She was extremely helpful with my auto claim and helped my settled the case.

reviews.text: I highly recommend Deborah Hubbs. She provided exceptional legal advice to me regarding purchasing an existing bossiness and related start up matters. I cannot thank her enough.

I engaged Deborah to review several complex agreements related to my employment.  She very thoroughly and thoughtfully presented me options of how I could proceed, identified risks in executing the agreements as-is, and presented alternate contractual language to mitigate those risks.  I truly felt counseled by Deborah and highly recommend her as an attorney who listens to her clients' needs and delivers clear and thoughtful advice.
Deborah has been incredible for our non-profit organization. I highly recommend you retain her services!
Deborah has been a great resource to our team as we’ve continued to grow our Geothermal energy business. I highly recommend her for your legal needs

Attorney Deborah Hubbs is the picture of professionalism. I assisted her with a legal project to protect her client's business and brand equity. Her approach to solving her client's problem was both courteous and thorough.

Deborah assisted me with the review and assessment of legal documents for a business transaction.  She was very timely and thorough in her review, and translated legal language in to everyday language to ensure I was clear in what the parameters of the document was saying and requiring.  She discussed the requirements with me, listened to my concerns and shared her advice with me.  Deborah’s experience and insight, as well as her character and concern for her clients is what helped give me peace as I determined my next steps with the transaction.  Thank you Deborah for your assistance and support and for the ease in which I was able to execute.

I have known Deborah personally for a number of years and know her to be a person of integrity, a truth-teller, a person with a deep passion to help others, and someone I would want in my corner if I were facing a tough situation. Having dealt with many different attorneys through my work over the years, I know they are not all high quality. Deborah Hubbs is!

I have nothing but good things to say about  Attorney Deborah Hubbs. She was very responsive, informative and gave me options. I would most definitely recommend her to anyone who is searching for great representation.

Deborah is everything you would ever want in a business attorney. She is smart, attentive, detail oriented, and will give you proper counsel regarding your specific circumstance. Look no further! This is the help you are looking for!

I highly recommend Deborah Hubbs. She gets results.
Thank You!

Randall and Marcy Acreman.

If you want a partnership with an Attorney who has integrity, honesty, is humble, smart and has diverse experience Deborah is the person you need to contact.   She cares about her clients and her community.  I would highly recommend her to anyone.

Working with Hubbs Law Group to create a contract was nothing short of an incredible experience. She is personable, responsive, professional, and all around a great person to work with. I would recommend Hubbs Law to anyone looking for legal guidance! Thank you, Deb!

I cannot express how happy I am that I went to Ms. Hubbs for my financial issue after the purchase of my truck from a local dealer!  I unknowingly bought several warranties for thousands more than what I had agreed to and didn't know how I would be able to get it back.  I contacted Ms. Hubbs and it didn't take long for her to meet with me.  She listened to my story and empathised with me and my situation since I was dealing with this and the failing health of my grandfather at the time. I showed her my contract with the dealer and, before too long, she corresponded with them about these unwanted warranties .  Long story short, she got through the convoluted mess of paperwork with this shady dealership and got me back all of the warranty money plus a rebate that they never included in the pricing, even though we agreed on it the day of purchase.  I received a couple of thousand more back than I thought I would get and I have only Ms. Hubbs to thank!  I have never had to go to a lawyer before, but, she made the experience very easy to deal with, even though the situation itself was not.  If I have any other legal matters in the future, I am for sure going to Ms. Hubbs for counsel and you should too!
Deborah is an amazing attorney with extensive knowledge and experience. She works tirelessly to achieve the best results for everyone who comes to her for help.

I have known Deborah Hubbs for many years and she is an attorney that cares about her clients. She has been a help to my family on several occasions and her expertise has been invaluable in each and every time I have called on her. I trust her and her knowledge of the law.

Deborah is a professional, diligent and talented attorney who truly cares about her clients.  She works hard to make sure her clients know all of the options available to them before making decisions.  I have full confidence in her and highly recommend her.

I have used the Hubbs Law Group for advice on several complex legal issues. I've found Deborah Hubbs to be an attorney of absolute integrity, very reliable, knowledgeable, and quick to respond via email. I recommend her without reservation.

This law firm can take care of you and your legal needs.  Deborah works hard to make sure you have the representation that you need.  She cares about her clients and will go above and beyond to help.  She is extremely knowledgeable and very professional.  Highly recommended.
This law firm is very responsive. Deborah is smart, understands the legal issues quickly, and fights hard for you.
Deborah is a lawyer that truly cares about her clients.  When you are in a difficult position or fighting a big company, you want Deborah on your side.

My divorce lawyer is basically a superhero in heels. She got me full custody of my kids and rescued them from an environment that looked like a live episode of Breaking Bad. She didn’t just win my case- she gave my kids back their peace, safety, and stability.

And unlike most lawyers who disappear after the paperwork is signed, she still checks in on us and the kids like we’re extended family. If you want someone who will fight tooth and nail for you while keeping her sense of humor intact, she’s the one you want on speed dial.

You need to hire Catherine asap!  She’s the most honest and brilliant woman I know!  She helped me in a viscous divorce and absolutely obliterated the opposing council.  After one hearing in front of the judge their mediation offer went from supervised visitation to shared custody over night.  Nobody wants to face this woman in any kind of trial.  She’s an absolute beast.  Highly recommend her for all of your legal needs!

Catherine Palmore was absolutely amazing and life saving for me. She made process easy, very understanding and helped me understand I had more rights then I knew I had. I was very nervous starting a process of getting a lawyer and going to court but she walked me through everything and made it simple. I HIGHLY recommend anyone and everyone to come here if you find yourself in the situation to have to go court

Absolutely horrible. I was referred to Catherine and what a mistake that was. She treated me like a child, undermined everything I said and in court just said things that weren’t even ever brought up. It was embarrassing. She over charged, and never stayed in contact and I was clueless to what to expect when I was in court because of lack of communication. I ended up settling with my ex myself because of how bad things were going with her. And yet she charged me for services I didn’t receive. WASTE OF MONEY, borderline robbery. Find someone else and don’t waste your hard earned money because she was so unprofessional id hardly say she’s a  “lawyer”

Catherine Palmore is one of the best attorneys I’ve had the pleasure of working with. I’ve worked with her over the past five years on two separate cases and both times came out with outcome that I didn’t even believe was possible going into it. She is truly great at what she does And I am so pleased that I was recommended to work with her because not only did I get the outcome I was looking for I got more than what I thought was possible. If you’re thinking about hiring her, I highly recommend not second-guessing it as she will definitely have your best interest at heart as she has a lot of connections to make the impossible possible!
I love her demeanor.  She's easy to talk to, and it's evident she cares about her clients.

Catherine is a fine attorney. She's careful and caring. She listens well and offers solid advice. I won my case, she was perfect in the courtroom. She will be my first call in civil matters in the future.

I do not recommend this attorney, she has screwed up my custody case so bad that it allows the mother to literally do whatever she wants with my children with the many loopholes she left in the custody agreement. I am having a very difficult time being able to see my children. I required to pick up and drop off at the mothers residence even though I live in missouri every 1st 3rd and 5th weekend. Currently i spend over 3400 bucks a month just to see my kids but pay 750 a month to support and raise them.

Please learn from me and find an attorney that is wiling to fight for you.

Catherine Palmore was recommended to me by two different people that I trust.  I am so thankful that I acted on their recommendation. She worked hard for me and was always there to answer any questions I had. If she could not pick up the phone when I called she always made it a point to send a text and tell me she would get with me ASAP. She listened to me and when I did not understand something she spoke with me until I felt comfortable and understood the situation. Her knowledge of family law was so helpful and she helped me walk through a very difficult time with confidence.

My wife and I recently used Catherine to update our wills and other related documents. In our initial meeting, Catherine did a great job of explaining the process and getting the pertinent details from us. Once the drafting and review process was done, we met with her and her wonderful team for the will signing “party”. We all laughed so much that it truly felt like a party!

Catherine Palmore is by far the best lawyer in The Woodlands and Conroe area, if not the state of Texas. She efficiently created a will for me and it was the best service that I have ever come across. I will be recommending her to all of my peers and coworkers. Not once did I find her service unprofessional or overpriced. She creates a welcoming environment in her office and is cutthroat in the courtroom, the perfect combination for a successful lawyer. Thank you, Catherine.

Catherine is a very knowledgeable, professional, and friendly attorney.  She listens to everything you have to say and is excellent at explaining your options in a clear manner. Also, anytime you contact her she is very prompt at getting back with you. If you need an attorney, I highly recommend Catherine Palmore.

Thorough. Personable. Professional. And even fun! My husband and I knew we needed to have our wills drawn up but weren’t sure where to start. We contacted Catherine at The Palmore Law Firm and were so grateful for how simple she made the process. With such a heavy topic and terminology that could have been overwhelming-  she managed to make it easy and dare I say enjoyable! We had a fantastic experience! Highly recommend!

We've known Catherine Palmore for 40 years, and use her services as our personal lawyer.  Very professional and personable with great communication skills.  Witty, with a great sense of humor!  Outstanding, in all respects!  We would, absolutely recommend using The Palmore Law Firm, PLLC.
Rusty Thatcher

I had Catherine draw up a will for me.   She listened carefully to all my requests and concerns.  When it came time to sign everything, she had everything just as I requested!  Plus she was extremely timely.   If I ever need the services of a lawyer in the future, Catherine will be the first one I call!

Our CPA referred Katherine to us regarding a family matter.  She listened to our concerns and advised in our best interests.  We were able to successfully win our position which allowed us to move forward in our lives.  We now keep The Palmore Law Firm on our speed dial just in case.  Thank you!

Catherine Palmore was not only one of the most caring people I have ever dealt with, she also handled my case with absolute professionalism and attention to detail. She always kept me fully informed and was an excellent communicator. I was grateful to have her handling my case and walking me through the process. She made an incredibly personally taxing process much easier. I would highly recommend her to anyone needing a family law attorney.

My experience with Palmore Law Firm was excellent from start to finish. I contacted Catherine about setting up a will for the first time. She is a person of integrity that you can trust. My experience with Palmore Law Firm definitely exceeded my expectations and I would highly recommend her to anyone!

Catherine with the Palmore Law Firm exceeded my expectations for my contract review. She was diligent, incredibly responsive and went over the contract with me and answered all of my questions. Such a pleasure to work with!
Worst experience. Scully is nice, but incompetent. Cooper is a complete jerk, not easy to deal with
Had a good experience, very professional treatment from Mr. Berger. I was given thorough review, prep time and assistance throughout the entire case.
Chris Lindstrom went above and beyond. VERY much appreciated his help, direction and quick responses.

Richard Canlas, Esq., turns the worst day of your life into the best day of your life. This is second time I’ve retained him legally, and God willing will be the last time I need to, but I know Who I’m going to call without a moment hesitation, if it gets to the point where I need a legal represent
again. If you get tangled up in the Texas legal system, even a little bit, even for something fairly innocuous, and you care about your reputation, then the money spent with him is well placed. There’s some truth to the old saying that you get what you pay for but with Richard you always get a little bit extra and you won’t be disappointed. I highly recommend him. I’ve known him for decades and he knows the system up there in Conroe, and he knows where to apply pressure and when to apply pressure and I think that if I aspired to be a lawyer, he would be One of my role models!
Sincerely,
RC

Mr. Canlas is a highly intelligent, dedicated, and hard working attorney. He fought for and stood by my son in his darkest hour. He is ethical, compassionate, and is able to think on his feet. Words cannot express my gratitude to him for obtaining justice for my son.
Top quality service with a professional who knows the laws very well. Helped me when i needed it. Will fight every angle and help get the results you want!

Honesty. Integrity. Transparency.
Richard Canlas represented my husband better than I could have ever imagined. My nerves were calmed and the process was always explained, My husband’s life was truly at risk with the charge he was facing (first-degree felony murder) even tho it was a self defense case the DA was out to take my husband life away.
Richard NEVER gave up and worked countless hours on his case, and was always very patient, and professional! We became a family because we cummunicated so much throughout this process, Richard showed his true emotional towards my husband’s life and that was our main goal for choosing amazing attorney. Richard and his team put so much preparation into the case I couldn’t have asked for anything more!
I was particularly impressed with his knowledge of the process and his straightforward advice. He's been doing this for some time and has not only good lawyer instincts but hard earned wisdom. In the trial phase it was clear how thoroughly Richard and his team had prepared, he accepted our case knowing it would be a tough one. He showed compassion for us and the trauma my husband and I had both been through I highly recommend Richard Canlas. He’s a WINNER!!!!
My husband can still have his life with his 3 daughters and wife again thanks to Richard and his team!!!
He defended my case until  be dismissed, he really care for his client . 100% recommended

Richard Canlas is such a great lawyer to have. If you're in need of a Lawyer to help you with your case, you should choose him. He helped me out and was always responsive. Any information that he needed, I gave it to him and he would handle it according to the law. I am so Grateful and Thankful that I had the privilege to have him as a lawyer. Even though every case is different, I was Blessed and Lucky but I'm positive that he will handle your case accordingly so that you will not have to worry about what your outcome will be. Dustan Neyland has personalized license plates on his BMW – an abbreviated notation of “Not Guilty.”  That is the confidence you get when you hire Dustan Neyland.  Sums it all up right there.  Dustan knows the law and how to protect your rights.  Dustan always had time to meet with me at his office.  There were several times that I was very concerned and Dustan put me at ease by inviting me to his office to discuss it.  Dustan always responded to my texts and emails.  Dustan is always well dressed and punctual to court.  I think Dustan’s best trait is his extremely likeable personality.  Dustan is the kind of guy that you want to be friends with.  As far as his legal expertise, Dustan has a brilliant mind.  Extremely knowledgeable about the criminal law in the State of Texas.  We never went to trial.  I’m super happy that Dustan got the DA’s office to dismiss the charge.  A huge weight has been lifted off my shoulders.

I made a great decision hiring Dustan Neyland last April (2019) based on his AVVO reviews.  I had very little time to interview multiple attorneys.  My ex had filed a Class 3 Felony Child Endangerment charge against me and Precinct 4 Constables were hunting me down like I was El Chapo.  I won custody of my son back in 2016.  My ex claimed that I had left bruises on my son, while disciplining him with a belt.  She lied to Precinct 4 constables and the DA accepted the charge.  The truth is that my son fell on his mountain bike playing with two friends at the elementary school on the weekend.  The boys had also been playing a game of spider.  I noticed the bruises Sunday night (April 14, 2019).  I disciplined my son the following Tuesday night.  I dropped my son off at school on Thursday morning (before Good Friday 2019), and that night his mother sent me emails asking how my son got the horrible bruises.  I explained to her 4 times that he fell on his mountain bike.  The following Monday, I had a warrant out for my arrest.  My ex would not return my son to me.

I never thought that my ex could lie to the police to get false charges accepted against me by the DA’s office.  Precinct 4 never contacted me to ask what happened.  My ex kept my son away from me starting Good Friday 2019 up until July 2019.  Then she filed in family court asking for sole custody of my son based on the family violence charge in criminal court.  I had Dustan representing me in criminal court and 2 family attorneys representing me in family court.  Dustan arranged a poly graph test and put together an excellent Grand Jury packet.  The Grand Jury indicted me on the felony charge (October 2019).  To quote “Bonfire of the Vanities” - "a grand jury would 'indict a ham sandwich,' if that's what you wanted."

Dustan communicated with the DA on the case, who agreed to speak with the therapist, and also interview my son.  We tried to schedule the interview with the child during Spring Break (March 2020) and then in April 2020.  However, the pandemic hit.  The DA’s offices were closed most of the summer. Dustan scheduled a zoom conference between my son and the DA on October 22nd.  My ex tried to manipulate my son by telling him that he could go to Juvie if he told the truth to the DA.  Dustan checked with the DA the day before the meeting, and the current DA (6th one on the case) found notes from the previous DA (5th DA on the case). The 5th DA had spoken to my son in April 2020 (on his mother’s cell phone).  Dustan also sent the DA’s office the transcripts from the psychiatrist’s testimony in family court (June 2020).  Dustan asked the DA to dismiss the charges based on their notes from the interview with the child or set for trial.  We had a hearing on October 26th, and it was reset for Nov 12th. The DA needed time to review the case.  The charge was dismissed on November 12 – “State cannot prove beyond a reasonable doubt.”  Thank you, Dustan Neyland (AKA the criminal defense attorney who gets “Not Guilty” verdicts).
Best lawyer there is hands down

First of all, if you ever find yourself looking for a criminal defense lawyer in Texas (of all states); then sooner or later you will probably wake up to the fact that you have just become personally acquainted with an indomitable tar-baby who’s ability to entangle you and keep you subservient to its will is unparalleled in the history of mankind.  There are two points I’m trying to make here:  1. the system and its agents (ie: the district attorney, the court appointed lawyer, even the janitor) does not give two flips about you or what happens to you, and:  2. The system is tough and has made short work of hundreds of thousands annually; so, unless you want to get tossed around and have your life lead down the pathway of demotion to the land of serfdom then you better have someone who both: cares about what happens to you, and is tough enough to fight the system on your behalf.
I personally know of only a FEW law firms in Harris County who fit this mold and Tolleson & Nash certainly is distinguished fittingly at the top of such a list.  In my somewhat long and illustrious career I have seen many types of lawyers from helpful, to incompetent, to downright criminally negligent.  I can picture most of these shysters probably chase ambulances in the evenings if they are not already posted up at the ER trolling for bait to use against the insurance companies.  In fact, I don’t think it’s a stretch to say that the profession of “Attorney” by and large is inhabited by a disproportionately greater percentage of shady individuals than any other single profession when compared to all other professions…agree or disagree:  Perhaps this can illustrate just how the odds are stacked against you.
If you are reading this because you are currently in need of legal representation then think of yourself looking back on this moment a year or two from now congratulating yourself for making such a solid choice for a lawyer. I have had Tolleson & Nash represent me in no less than four such disagreements with police officers and even though on the surface of said charges it appeared that I might not be here on the other side of this keyboard to write this review; Shannon was able to cut right through the BS in an almost wizard-like fashion to reveal the part of the story the police always seem to leave out, that is: the part of the story that actually defends you (to one degree or another).
In a few years with the right decision you could be sitting in your home typing whatever to whomever…or you could be elsewhere. I feel that I made have made wise choices in regards to representation, albeit more from luck that any from any skills I possess seeing as how  Tolleson & Nash was recommended to me by one of my close associates ages ago, and I hope the same luck for whoever reads this.

My child can live safely in the United States without the fear of being abducted internationally.

I would also like to add that Raya has been extremely helpful, and studied my case in great detail and helped me understand the workings of mediation, and all the options available to me.

This is one attorney you would want on your side, and be assured that you have the best on your team fighting for you!

We hired Mr. Kemp because our daughter got a speeding ticket on a residential road going allegedly 25 miles over. It’s our first speeding ticket ever in our family so we weren’t sure what to do especially since she’s only 17 and our Life360 stated what her speed was which didn’t match the ticket. He helped us fight it and we were lucky enough to get it deferred with a couple of requirements. We are now done and submitted paperwork to the courts. Hoping it all goes through smoothly so we can move on from this! Thank you Jeff Kemp for your help and guidance!
After he did not help my 84 yr old mom. he went to lunch laughing with the other lawyers.

He was on my company’s network of lawyers so I called him to inquire about adoptions and immediately took my case and my money in October 2021. I turned in the documents needed for the case on November 2021, I called multiple times to ask about the next steps and I didn’t get an answer until I filed a complaint.

My company said he wasn’t listed as family law and shocked that he took my case.  He convinced me to keep him instead of hiring someone else.  Moving forward, we got the court date set and the judge approved the adoption.  I was told that his office will get me several copies of the certified documents, but after a month of waiting, nothing happened.

I called and his paralegal Ashley every week to ask for the status, but couldn’t get me an answer.  I went to the courthouse myself and they said the judge hasn’t signed the final document and that only Ashley or someone from Mr. Kemp’s office can request it.

I called to let Mr. Kemp know, but he said Ashley quit and I quote, he said “I don’t know the ins and outs of how to go from here.”  I asked him to go to the courthouse and request to unseal the case because he’s the only one authorized to do so and he told me , “you’ll have to hire another lawyer. Good luck.”

I paid another lawyer to pick up where his office left off and found out that Kemp Law Firm had other documents that he didn’t even submit.

He hires paralegals to do the work because he doesn’t know how to do it.  However for some reason, his paralegals keeps quitting on him.  He went through 3 paralegals from the time I hired him from my case up to the time he told me good luck.

I was going to hire him for 2 other cases, but better to go somewhere else.

Never have I ever came across such an unprofessional lawyer. She shows no regards in her clients if she’s not getting paid but took the job to be a   Court appointed lawyer; . She waited until the day before our Pretrial to get information from my wife ; the witness and she had since may 5 to let myself and wife know what we needed to provide to her; instead of hearing from her a day or 2 later, we literally heard from her at 730 pm the day before pretrial, (June 5) 1 month later.

I’ve never been more disgusted and disappointed in a lawyer. Then she tried to bring my line of work and compare it to hers; I work in the (medical optical field) and doctors would never treat patients the way she treated us as clients. Rethink dealing with this woman. When I tried to mediate she just hung up in my face. Then even made a comment about how she could be getting paid rather than doing this line of work. Which is fine; but if this is what you chose to do in your professional line of work, you should major in something else miss kemp, bc this was the worst youve done by far. And your reputation won’t go far in being this way to people who are trying to clear their name and have all the proof to do so. You’d think this case was open and close. Just disgusting. I wouldn’t trust her even if you had the substantial evidence to prove yourself innocent. On top of it all- she’s rude, not ever on time and totally non communicative. If she’s not getting paid; she won’t do the work and won’t fight as hard - her words specifically.

It is a slow process, but I think that is the case in every case - especially when COVID pops up in the middle of it.  Mr Kemp is knowledgeable.  What I didn't care for was the system - we took the absolute honest way out and felt cheated in the end.  We should have taken Mr Kemps advice to use doctors that he provides recommendations for rather than using insurance.  Your settlement is based on medical expenses and no credit is given for taking the most affordable way out and doing everything as if you were spending your own money.  We just wanted to keep our normal doctors and confidence in those doctors.  But in the end, it definitely weakened the value of the case.  Overall, I probably wouldn't use them again, but we were happy with our results and their service.

reviews.ownerResponse: I represented this client in a personal injury matter.  We settled the case and the client was satisfied with the settlement amount.  The client then asked me to negotiate a bill reduction with one of his medical providers.  I negotiated a substantial reduction of the bill and, at the client's instruction, I signed a letter guaranteeing payment to this provider.  When the settlement check arrived, the client then insisted that I give him the funds intended for the medical provider instead of paying it directly to the provider.  I explained to him that I had a contractual and an ethical obligation to pay the provider. The client then became very upset and told me he would "get even with me" for not giving him the money.  This review is his attempt to do so.  At the Kemp Law Firm, it is always our goal to do whatever possible to keep our clients happy and, in almost all instances, we succeed, however, we will never do anything illegal or unethical and, unfortunately, that is what this client was seeking to have us do.

I had an excellent experience with Horak Law. From the moment I contacted the office, the staff was professional, responsive, and genuinely helpful. Legal matters can be stressful, but the team made the process feel much more manageable.

Corrina was especially outstanding. She took the time to answer all of my questions thoroughly and never made me feel rushed. She explained everything clearly, made sure I understood my options, and was always patient and professional. It’s rare to find someone who is both knowledgeable and truly cares about making sure clients feel informed and supported.

Her communication and attention to detail made a huge difference, and I’m very grateful for the help I received. If you’re looking for a law office that is professional, organized, and committed to helping their clients, I highly recommend Horak Law.

WE LOVE HORAK LAW FIRM!!!! Matt, Nicole, and Ana all go above and beyond while working on your case! They are professional and personable! I could go on and on about how amazing the team at Horak Law is but I’ll keep it short and sweet! If you need legal advice/representation THIS IS THE LAW FIRM TO CALL!!!

I came across Horak Law because of a divorce. I liked that they had criminal and divorce experience because I knew this was gonna be difficult. They did not disappoint, Matt did a great job of using his resources to minimize cost and I felt like the direction and advice I received was spot on. I would say if you’re going through a divorce and you need someone who is willing to truly help point you in the right direction and be in your corner then Matt Horak is your man. Take the time to interview this gentleman because my ex spouse went through several attorneys due to mismanagement of time and money and even though we were getting a divorce I don’t feel like anyone deserves that. Matt does not run that type of law firm. Also on a sidenote the folks he has working for him are great. I dealt mostly with Anna and Kelly and they were both a pleasant to work with. If I still lived in Texas these are the type of people I would want to spend time with.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Jonathan, for the wonderful review and for trusting Horak Law during a difficult time. We’re glad Matt, Anna, and Kelly provided clear direction, helped minimize costs, and treated you with the respect you deserved. We appreciate your recommendation to interview attorneys and are honored you would choose us if you were still in Texas. Wishing you the best going forward, and we’re here if you ever need assistance again.

reviews.text: Mr. Horak and his team are truly exceptional and I’m very grateful for their expertise! I highly recommend Horak Law for criminal defense. I worked with Matt Horak and his team for over six months, and from our first conversation I knew he was the right attorney to represent me.

Matt attended every hearing, communicated consistently despite my living out of state, and negotiated tirelessly with multiple district attorneys. My case involved a criminal charge that could have destroyed my personal and professional life. After a long, drawn-out process in which the state repeatedly rescheduled hearings, Matt secured a dismissal before trial.

The criminal-justice process is grueling for a defendant, and Horak Law made a stressful situation manageable through professionalism, persistence, and clear communication. I am deeply grateful for their representation and would not hesitate to recommend Horak Law.

Hire Horak Law without hesitation if you need strong, committed criminal defense.

reviews.text: The Team at Horak Law is awesome! It was pleasure working with Corrina! She handled my concerns like a champ! But let me tell you about Matt. I’d been sitting at the back of the court room for about a half hour. In walks Matt. He walks up to the front bench and sets his things down.  He looks around the court room and locates me.  He walks over shakes my hand and says “good morning, give me a few minutes”. He goes back to the front bench sits down and takes out his laptop. Now here’s where I noticed something that I hadn't seen before. Typically the defense attorneys form a line at the prosecutors desk to get their opportunity to sit and speak to the prosecutor. Well today, the prosecutor came to Matt at the front bench. He sits down. They talk for about two minutes. They both get up. Matt packs up his laptop and walks over to me and says “lets go”. We walk out of the court room and he says “your case is dismissed”. Whaaaatt!?! I just saw a real life episode of Suits before my eyes. Matt is my Harvey Specter! Thank you Matt!!! You are the man!
reviews.ownerResponse: Finally, a review that made me laugh out loud. Thanks Hector! This one will make my wife and son (huge Suits fans) so proud. Thanks for your patience. Sometimes I have several courts to run to and they all start at the same time. I wish you the best,

My case/charge was criminal mischief felony from a car accident that wasn't my fault.
I had retained another attorney that sent other attorneys to just show up that had no idea what my case was. They did nothing but continue my case until you couldn't, then wanted me to plead guilty for something I didn't do.
Be careful if you're contacted by phone from random attorneys, I was.
I was recommended to Matt by a close friend.
I went into see him a broken & scared man. I was at my wits end from all the stress.
From the minute I met him,I knew he was the right attorney for me.
He never promised me anything but instead he listened to what happened read & watched the multiple body cam videos & came up with the evidence we needed from the other person who was in the accident that claimed a child was there, when there was none. Establishing everything he needed to present to the prosecution a clear case of insurance fraud from the other party & my charges were dismissed !
What happened to me could have happened to anyone!!
If you're having doubts about him,put them aside & hire him now!
You won't regret it.
He got my life back for me!

Tom, an innocent man.

reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Enrique. This is Jonathan Harris one of the partners at the Firm.   I am very sorry we could not help you.  To win a wet floor case, we have to prove how long the water was on the floor and that it was there long enough for the store to be notified or find it and clean it up. That’s Texas law and it makes it very hard to win these cases because if a customer spill something in a store, we’d have to show how long it was on the floor, which most of the time is impossible. I would suggest you contact the Houston Lawyer Referral service and maybe you can find someone who wants to take your case.

21 months… 21 months of unwavering team dedication.
Morgan and his team have done an absolutely phenomenal job guiding me through the legal system—the ups and downs, the setbacks, and ultimately, the victories.
From our very first meeting, they listened to everything I had to say with compassion and without judgment. I was assured that they would fight for me—and they truly did. The entire team worked seamlessly, united in their approach. I can honestly say I couldn't fault a single person. Each of them treated me with kindness and respect, even on the days when I had none left for myself.
The legal system is an intimidating place, especially when you’ve been an upstanding citizen for over 50 years and have no experience with courtrooms or judicial processes. It’s terrifying. But having a team that stands firmly behind you makes all the difference.
Morgan and his team walked me through every step, offering clarity, support, and relentless dedication. I couldn’t be more pleased with the outcome—and more grateful for the people who got me there.

reviews.text:
I recently consulted with this law firm regarding a potential employment discrimination case. While the initial consultation was informative, the subsequent handling of my case left me deeply disappointed.

After paying the consultation fee, I was assured that I had a strong case and was quoted a flat fee of $5,000. However, the demand letter that was drafted on my behalf was riddled with errors and had to be revised multiple times.

To my dismay, after receiving a response from the employer's attorney, I was informed that the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) may not apply to the academy in question due to its faith-based status. This critical piece of information was not disclosed to me prior to my decision to proceed with the case. Had I known this, I would have reconsidered my options.

Despite repeated attempts to contact my attorney via email, requesting a partial refund due to the lack of clarity and communication, I have received no response. This lack of responsiveness has left me frustrated and uncertain about my legal rights.

Overall, my experience with this law firm has been unsatisfactory. The initial promise of a strong case and a flat fee was not met, and the subsequent communication and legal advice have been inadequate. I would not recommend this firm to others seeking legal representation.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Kim,

I believe you left this review for the wrong company. Our consultations are absolutely free, and we do not handle cases related to employment discrimination and the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA). We would appreciate it if you took this review down and directed it to the appropriate business.

Thank you,
Marc Whitehead

Not once did we ever get a phone call returned nor an email responded to. We never got updates on what was happening nor about any documentation sent over. I called this week asking for an update and again I was told someone would give me a call back still nothing, no communication nor a returned phone call. I then get a notification this week that I had a certified letter from Hastings. I had to leave work early and rush to the post office only to finally get informed that they don’t think they will be successful so therefore they won’t be moving forward. Why not keep our family updated throughout the year so we could’ve taken time to meet with other attorneys who might actually care about our situation. I signed a contract for the preparation of a Letter of Testamentary to identify an Independent Executor for an estate. The estate consisted of a single checking account - no other assets. The service was completed; however, from start to finish it took just shy of 12 months. It required me calling after extended periods of hearing nothing to get any updates. Additionally, my credit card was charged for fees without notice or statement of charges being sent to me. I discovered the charges on my credit card statement.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We appreciate you expressing your concerns. Sadly, this is the first we have heard of any dissatisfaction with us at Weygandt Law, even in a private setting. We believe the process & working with you was almost seamless.

When we initially spoke with you, we were under the impression that the deceased Estate could have been dealt with by filing a Small Estate Affidavit (“SEA”). However, about a month after engaging us, you found the deceased’s Will. Unfortunately, a SEA cannot be used in Texas if the deceased left a valid Will. Once we discovered a Will existed, we switched gears & started preparing the necessary filings for the Probate of the Will.

From the date that you initially engaged with us, it took six (6) months to go through the process (to get the Court’s blessing on the Will), and receive the power to take care of business with the Letters of Testamentary, which are required by financial institutions whenever there isn’t ownership/authorization or a transfer of death designation. While six (6) months may seem like a long time, it is certainly well within the boundaries of what is reasonably expected when dealing with the Probate Court. We make a point to fully foreshadow the good, bad & the horrors of the probate process on our initial free 15 minute call. This is why it's always helpful to have a comprehensive estate plan in place!

While you might think that the number of assets (or the amount within the estate) directly affects the amount of time it takes to navigate through the process, it does not. Every matter has the same hurdles, required documents & waiting periods, and has to deal with congested court calendars.

As for filing fees, we highlighted this on the initial call (so we don’t have to request a higher retainer amount) and it is also outlined in our typical probate engagement letter that you would be responsible for any filing fees incurred in connection with the matter.

While we may have been in communication for two (2) months after you received your Letters of Testamentary, we were working through the remaining filings, which are legally required to be filed with the Court before the matter can be closed (otherwise you could be subject to a revocation of your fiduciary position by the Court).

As for any delay in the process, our lead estate planning & probate paralegal was out on maternity leave for the first portion of the engagement. As with any small & mighty cohesive team, any absence (no matter the length) will impact bandwidth. While we can admit it did delay the process on our end to some degree, we believe we resolved the matter without any incidents or unexpected setbacks and our brief loss of bandwidth did not substantially impact the trajectory of the matter.

We apologize for the slight delay in the process and/or communication, and as always, we will strive to do better in the future. I understand my team has reached out multiple times to discuss your concerns, and I (David), just did as well. I’d like to discuss the matter with you personally so we can do what we can to make it right. Please give us a call back at 713-489-5900.

- David W. Weygandt

I had an excellent experience working with Mr. Mohammad Mehboob. From the beginning, he was professional, responsive, and thorough in explaining the legal process and my options. What stood out the most was his clear communication and genuine care for my case—he always kept me updated and made sure I felt comfortable at every step. He expertise and attention to detail gave me confidence throughout the process, and the outcome was better than I expected. I truly appreciate his dedication and highly recommend him to anyone in need of reliable legal representation.

I had the pleasure of working with Mohammad Mehboob on a case against a videographer for my twins’ first birthday, and I could not be happier with the outcome or the service I received.

Mr. Mehboob was attentive, efficient, and highly knowledgeable. He personally guided me through every step of the process — from drafting a strong demand letter, to advising me on hiring a process server, filing for alternative service, and pursuing a default judgment. He was also the one who recommended filing for treble damages, something I would never have thought to request on my own, and because of that, I ultimately won three times the original amount requested.

What stood out most was his direct communication and accessibility. I always spoke directly with him — never through an assistant or third party — and he made himself available at various times of the day. His responses were prompt, thoughtful, and he even provided insight on unrelated legal questions.

I am extremely satisfied with his services and impressed by his legal expertise. I will absolutely use him again in the future, as he also offers estate planning services such as will preparation. I highly recommend Mr. Mehboob to anyone in need of a responsive, skilled, and trustworthy attorney.

I filed for SSDI and hired a law firm. In 8 months with that law firm I never once was able to talk to an actual attorney, I was provided poor guidance by there caseworkers, and on a couple instances was provided very poor (wrong) answers to questions I had to better support my case. It was almost as if they were trying to ensure my case went to an ALJ hearing to maximize their payout. I fired them and after some research I found Tyler and Maderer law firm. Bottom line, they are awesome. I spoke on the phone and via email multiple times with the attorneys (Chris and Gigit) that actually were handling my case. They gave me very sound guidance and advice, that had my first law firm gave me, I strongly believe I would have been approved at Initial or worst case Reconsideration. They definitely came across as trying to help the client and not about increasing their bottom line. Their caseworker and paralegal assigned to my case were bulldogs. They ensured all my supporting medical documents were attained, which the other law firm didn't do. When they had issues attaining medical documents, they reached out to me, and between the two of us, we got them. I really can't speak highly enough about this law firm!!!
They were so proactive with regards to my SSDI case we decided to also do our Estate planning (Will and Trust). Again, they didn't disappoint!
Not only did they easily help me get fully approved for SSDI, my wife and I feel very good if anything unfortunate happens to either one, or both of us. Every I is dotted and every T has been crossed. Tyler and Maderer has earned every penny paid to them, and some!!!

reviews.text:
Working with Anna Din as our attorney was truly a blessing during one of the most stressful times of our lives. She was professional, caring, committed, and always honest with us. Her communication was consistent, and she carried herself with confidence—never arrogant. She took the time to be thoughtful and helpful, submitted and updated all paperwork on time, and always made sure my partner and I were involved in every decision.
Anna’s receptionist and paralegal were also incredibly kind and supportive throughout the entire case. They kept us informed about documents, fees, and next steps, and their compassion did not go unnoticed.
Anna not only did her job, but went above and beyond by showing genuine care during a very emotional child custody process. She made sure we understood all possible outcomes and supported our desire to focus on the child’s best interest. Her dedication and preparation helped us reach a successful resolution during mediation—we never even had to go to trial, which was a huge relief.
I would definitely recommend Anna if you’re looking for an attorney who is thorough, professional, and compassionate. My partner and I are forever grateful and blessed to have had her on our side. Thank you, Anna Din, for your dedication and support.
Mrs Din and her staff were top notch! The entire process was smooth, efficient, and timely. This is exactly the kind of personalized and professional service everyone deserves. Highly recommend!

I hired her to handle my divorce, but unfortunately, I never felt she was truly advocating for my best interests. The process felt more like basic paperwork filing and deadline tracking, without much guidance or legal advice along the way. At times, I even felt she was more aligned with my ex’s side than mine.

To be fair, she may be very skilled at what she does, and perhaps my expectations were different. As someone who had been a homemaker for 18 years, I may have lacked the experience or confidence to express my concerns at the time.

If I ever found myself in a similar situation again, I would more likely look for representation that feels more supportive.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to share your experience. I am truly sorry to hear that you felt unsupported during such a significant and difficult time. Although I wish you communicated these concerns during this process, your feedback now is also important, and I take it to heart.

Every client's situation is unique, and divorce can feel overwhelming. I regret that we did not have the opportunity to resolve your concerns so that I could provide the level of reassurance or guidance you needed throughout the process. It was never my intention for you to feel that way.

I always strive to advocate for my client's best interest with diligence and care, and my interests would definitely not be aligned with your ex. However, I do understand that how advocacy is felt can vary from person to person. I wish you confidence and clarity as you move forward.

reviews.text: Communicates right away. The staff is very helpful and polite.  I appreciate all the work that was put in.

Perhaps if you and your ex have agreed on every aspect of your divorce and the only action that needs to be taken is filing paperwork, Ms. Din is a good choice. If your case requires legal expertise, she is a poor choice. I was very clear with Ms. Din about the outcome I was pursuing during the consultation; only one modification to the existing MSA. She indicated at that time that she felt confident she could handle the case. After burning through her retainer and getting nothing accomplished, she withdrew from the case (which is something she frequently does) stating she didn’t think she could get what I wanted. Additionally, we had conflicts regarding the strategy of the case, which, admittedly were complex. After sighting “office policies” that are not reflected in her contract, she withdrew two weeks prior to a scheduled mediation. 2 weeks. Six months and $4000 later, absolutely nothing was accomplished and most importantly, she compromised my case.

Response: “compromising” my case is an opinion, not a fact. My case never began. I asked only for mediation and that never happened. Note, zero of the stated facts are denied.
reviews.ownerResponse: I'm sorry you still feel this way. I disagree.  I think it is best not to represent someone who will not trust and follow my counsel. Choosing not to represent you was the right decision to make, and I also provided you with many options on how to proceed.  I wish you the best in your journey ahead.

I wholeheartedly recommend Ms. Din as a divorce attorney.

I couldn’t find anyone to take my case because it was “too small” but Amaro Law Firm went to bat for me and talked directly to both the insurance company and also my specialists to ensure that I was taken care of correctly and on time. Their communication is open, honest and straight-forward and the people here really care! Madeline Joya was my main contact and she was so kind! reviews.text: I have been the custodial parent since we split up when my daughter was two.  Her birth mother took me back to court every two years or so throughout the entirety of her adolescence, always claiming something new. She would get more and more visitation rights, then not use them. She tried to get me locked up for denying visitation, made false claims against myself and members of my family. My daughter graduated second in her class last year, and is now a freshman at ATM.  I was kept in the position for her entire adolescence of constantly working 70-90 hour weeks to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads, all while paying to fight a new case every two years or so. I’ve had multiple lawyers over the years, and several are strictly concerned about money. Mrs Fuentez did not hound me when I fell behind on payments, the quality of her representation did not change. She maintained consistent and professional contact.  I truly appreciate her having faith in me when I was fighting my hardest to keep my family afloat. I fear lawyers like her are becoming a dying breed, and I 100% recommend retaining her if your family is truly your top priority.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your review!  It was my pleasure representing you and protecting your family’s best interests.

reviews.text:
From the moment I first met Sandra, her matter-a-fact approach, professionalism, and genuine compassion were evident. She always took the time to listen attentively to my concerns, and then laid out the hard truths about what I was facing, before providing her thoughts and strategies to approach them. While her honesty sometimes left me frustrated with our system, at the end of every conversation I always felt like I was more knowledgeable and better prepaid. Sandras firm, but empathetic approach, combined with her understanding of family law always put me at ease and gave me tremendous confidence that I had made the right choice in selecting her for this battle!

What truly set’s Fuentez Law apart from everyone else is their meticulous approach to every aspect of my case. They left no stone unturned, conducting thorough research, analyzing every detail, and building a compelling strategy tailored to my specific circumstances. Their legal expertise was evident as they guided me through complex and strenuous legal procedures, explaining each step in a clear and concise manner, ensuring I fully understood the approach.

Throughout the case, she displayed awesome communication skills, always promptly responding to my questions and providing regular updates on any new developments. She was always available, whether by phone or email to address any concerns or alleviate any fears I had. This provided me with the much-needed reassurance during what was undoubtedly a very emotionally challenging time.

What I was most impressed by was her unwavering commitment to my kids well-being. She always displayed a genuine concern for their best interests, understanding the importance of maintaining a stable and loving environment. Sandras ability to articulate to the courts the things that were most important for my kids continued growth and development was phenomenal in presenting a compelling case for custody.

When the day of the court hearing arrived, Sandra demonstrated her exceptional courtroom skills. Her confidence, and articulate arguments were truly impressive, leaving a lasting impact on the judge and opposing counsel. Thanks to her hard work and expertise, we achieved a favorable outcome, securing custody of my kids and ensuring they would have every opportunity to become successful in life!

I wholeheartedly recommend Fuentez Law to anyone seeking a family law attorney. Her commitment, and compassion , but tough love approach truly sets her apart. Her guidance and support during one of the most challenging times in my life will forever be appreciated and I am forever grateful for her instrumental role in providing an amazing future for my kids.

If you're searching for a family law lawyer who will go above and beyond to protect your interests and fight for the well-being of your children, Sandra Fuentez is the exceptional choice. Trust her expertise, and you will be in very capable hands throughout the legal journey.

Thank you once again, Fuentez Law for your dedication and continued support in helping my family.

reviews.text:
I have never written a google review in my entire life, and this is my first review.

I was brutally cheated by the Legal system and my Attorney (SB), and I believe he colluded with my ex-wife, Attorney (MM), and Children's Attorney (SW), appointed by the Court.  I am devastated and helpless and can't believe this can happen in America.  I applied for Divorce in October 2018 in a small town called Brenham in Texas. In June 2019, a temporary hearing occurred; my Attorney (SB), didn't ask questions related to how I raised my kids and didn't cross-verify many key items what my ex-wife said to the Court.  Also, he didn't file a Request for Relief before the Temporary hearing, which my ex-wife's Attorney  (MM) pointed out. The Court decided to give Child custody to my ex-wife and I was kicked out of my home.

My ex-wife's Attorney (MM) filed a petition to appoint a Children's Attorney just a couple of weeks before the Jury trial was originally planned, and the Court immediately appointed SW. She met for the first time, and I shared  some key OFW messages and shared details about how my ex-wife was not cooperating with co-parenting, doing parent alienation, and the kids' grades were going downhill. She asked me to send all the OFW photos, videos, and text messages, and I sent an email. After sending the email, She even refused to acknowledge the email and refused to meet 2nd time as she told me she would do. My kids always share what Atttorney says to them, and I asked my Attorney (SB), why Children Attorney (SW) did not ask which parent did what before the Divorce. After this, Children Attorney (SW) somehow came to know; she started telling my kids that their conversation was private and should not be shared with anyone. She took the stance that my ex-wife should get kids custody and never put together one single exhibit to support it other than using my ex-wife's Exhibits. I shared this with my Attorney (SB), and nothing changed. She even met with my kids at my ex-wife's place after the Jury decision and told my kids that conversation is private and can't be shared with anyone.

After several postponements of the Jury trial, the Jury trial was held in August 2022.  By God's grace and Robby Neal help and support, I could share most of my story with the Jury and how I raised my two little boys.  After a seven-day trial, the Jury gave me kids custody, and Divorce was granted in favor of me.  Finally, the divorce decree was signed in August 2023 with split custody, and the property was split unfairly and unjustly, and I ended up with no money in my bank account with thousands and thousands of loans (More than 100K).  Even though Jury game me Right to designate Primary residence, the Court decided to give the home to my ex-wife and now some how law changed. After Temporary hearing, The Judge gave same Right to designate primary residence and then my Attorney (SB) told me that my ex-wife designated my house as Primary residence and I am kicked out.

I called many Applette court attorneys and found out that I couldn't afford to fight for Justice.  During the process,  I had an appointment with Susan, and before she called me on October 4, 2023, she had reviewed my case on a high level. After asking me a few questions, she agreed to represent me, and the fees she quoted were 70% less than the lowest amount I heard so far.  On October 5, 2023, I signed the contract.

I have no words to describe how grateful I am to have Susan as my Attorney for the appeal. She is a Guardian angel sent by God during devastating moments in my life to help me and fight for Justice. Thank you to Susan and her team for helping me during this process.  From bottom of heart, THANK YOU and THANK YOU Susan for helping me to fight for Justice and THANK YOU god for helping me to find incredible Susan.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for such a positive review. We are grateful to have you as our client.

This situation has taught me one thing, that immigration is tough. Please get yourself a knowledgeable immigration law attorney like Ms. Martinez.

reviews.text: They stole my money. They're terrible people, they treat you very badly. I went to them on April 28th to start my divorce. They asked for $3,900, half of my case fee. They only returned $883.50, saying they deducted the cost for each call and message, and they themselves didn't return the money. That's why I had to call them. They're thieves, they don't want to give me my money back.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ms. Lagunes: We're sorry you're not satisfied with the refund. However, we had a contract that you breached. You made several appointments with our office, but you didn't keep them or fulfill your duties as a client. We made several exceptions for you because you said your case was an emergency, and we even canceled other appointments to accommodate you on more than four occasions. Most clients know that deposits are non-refundable, but we made this exception for you. You were only charged for the work our office performed, and like any profession, we have the right to be compensated for our work. The fact that you no longer wanted to pursue your divorce doesn't mean you can break the contract. We wish you luck.
