reviews.text:
A Cautionary Tale: Hopkins Centrich Law Firm Falls Short of Expectations

Rating: ★☆☆☆☆ (1/5)

I regret to share a deeply disappointing experience with Hopkins Centrich Law Firm, an establishment that, based on their advertising, appeared to be a promising choice for handling my specific case. My interaction with this firm, however, has left me profoundly dissatisfied and disillusioned.

From the outset, I was drawn in by Hopkins Centrich's self-proclaimed specialization in the type of case I wished to file. Motivated by their marketing, I proceeded to engage their services and handed over a substantial $25,000 retainer. Little did I know that this would mark the beginning of a frustrating and regrettable ordeal.

Despite their initial assurances and promises, Hopkins Centrich failed to uphold their end of the bargain. Over the course of a year, they claimed to be diligently preparing my case but, to my dismay, never actually filed anything. What followed was a complete breakdown in communication. My attempts to reach out via phone calls and emails were met with silence, leaving me in the dark about the status of my case and the reasons for their sudden lack of responsiveness.

When I finally mustered the courage to request a refund of my retainer and the return of my case file, Hopkins Centrich's conduct took a turn for the worse. They begrudgingly returned only $21,000 of the retainer, withholding a significant portion without any valid explanation. Shockingly, they flat-out refused to provide me with my case file, a clear violation of the transparency and accountability one would expect from a reputable law firm.

Compounding the issue, Hopkins Centrich displayed a blatant disregard for the State Bar's informal and formal complaint resolution processes. They ignored attempts to address the communication breakdown through the established channels, leaving me without recourse for the mistreatment I endured.

My interactions were primarily with Kirby Hopkins, and it was disheartening to find that when communication ceased, no one else in the firm stepped in to rectify the situation. The lack of internal accountability only further underscores the unprofessionalism and lack of integrity within the firm.

In conclusion, my experience with Hopkins Centrich Law Firm has been nothing short of a cautionary tale. Prospective clients should exercise extreme caution before entrusting this firm with their cases or hard-earned money. The misleading claims, poor communication, and unresponsiveness exhibited by Hopkins Centrich are a disservice to the legal profession, and I sincerely hope that others are spared from falling victim to similar deception.

reviews.text: Richard Grimes is, without a doubt, the best lawyer that I have ever worked with. He is extremely knowledgeable and is able to seamlessly delve into complex cases. I switched to his law firm in the middle of my complicated divorce as well as business litigation case and the transition was seamless due to his ability to grasp the details of my case. Despite a difficult opposing counsel, Richard was able to get my case to move quickly. I wish that I started both cases with him rather than wasting my time at other law firms. I was often unable to understand the legal jargon, but Mr. Grimes has a wealth of knowledge and simplifies legal terms so that his clients are able to understand every component of their case. In fact, he is very responsive both during meetings and outside of meetings, never letting a client feel uncertain or afraid. His fees are reasonable and affordable without ever overcharging clients for anything that is unnecessary. He has all of the qualities of an excellent lawyer: professionalism, effective communication, willingness to listen, and a keen judgement from years of practice. However, his most amazing attributes are an immense passion for his profession and compassion towards his clients. Most importantly, he is an amazing person who is a pillar of reassurance for his clients and is able to fathom the emotions tied to each case. He has restored my faith in the justice system. I am extremely happy about the results of my cases. Thank you, Richard and Sandra. Honestly, this law firm deserves more than just five stars. I highly recommend hiring him as your lawyer and working with this law firm because you will not regret your decision.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Gollinger,
I am sorry you were not happy with our service, but if you recall, I did speak to you personally. As I previously indicated, we do handle cases like the one you called about. However, we have to be selective about the cases we take, and we cannot take every case from every potential client. By being selective, we are able to ensure that we provide the clients we choose to represent with the best quality legal service. Moreover, this allows our clients to feel confident that if we have taken their case, we believe our representation will provide them with a significant benefit. For those cases we do not take, we try to suggest a law firm that may be better suited to provide assistance. I believe this is what we attempted to do for you. In any event, I want to personally thank you for giving us the opportunity to consider your case, and I wish you the best of luck in the future.

I work with immigrants who have fled their countries in desperate and complicated circumstances.  Finding a lawyer as accomplished as Lorena Perez McGill has made a huge difference in the  possibilities for positive  outcomes for some of these people. Ms. Perez McGill is a fiercely dedicated lawyer with deep experience in immigration work in our country.  Her understanding of the politics and cultures of the countries from which her clients come has been a strong plus as well.  She has a network of relationships throughout the US and abroad which she can tap into, including social justice and faith groups, academics,  journalists and experts.

Many of her clients have endured debilitating physical and emotional trauma in their home countries, on their journeys, and in the US at the hands of ICE.  But  Lorena treats her clients with heartfelt compassion and respect, which promotes their healing  and their ability to be strong witnesses in their own cases.

It is wonderful to work with her, and I trust her completely!

He sensed my nervousness from the first call and did a great job helping me understand Bankruptcy isn't a bad thing. I plan to recommend West Legal Group every time the opportunity presents itself. reviews.text:
I hired Brain West to manage my bankruptcy case. From start to finish he demonstrated exceptional legal skill and attention to detail. He explained my options in plain language, kept the process organized, and handled the paperwork thoroughly. His prompt responses and steady follow-through removed a lot of stress and kept everything moving smoothly.

During the process the court dismissed my case due to a filing issue. Brain moved quickly to resolve the problem — he immediately addressed the underlying issue, got the dismissal vacated, and had my case reinstated so I didn’t lose my place in the process. His speed and competence in that moment made a huge difference.

What set him apart was the personal care he brought to the work. Beyond the legal details, he offered spiritual and practical perspective that helped me process the emotional side of filing. He also gave candid feedback when necessary — one moment felt personal at the time, but it proved constructive and helped me see how my kindness and people-pleasing contributed to my debt.

On top of everything, his fees were fair; he wasn’t the money-hungry type I’d seen at other firms. For a knowledgeable, communicative attorney who cares about your outcome both legally and personally, I wholeheartedly recommend Brain West.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Kim, I’m glad I could bring clarity and organization to the process and step in quickly when things took an unexpected turn. Getting your case reinstated and keeping everything on track was critical, and I’m grateful we were able to handle that together.

What really stands out to me is your openness during the process. Bankruptcy isn’t just legal—it’s emotional—and I respect the trust you placed in me to address both sides honestly. I’m thankful the perspective and candid conversations were ultimately helpful. It was truly a pleasure working with you, and I appreciate the recommendation more than you know.
— Attorney, Brian West

As an older woman and a law-abiding citizen, I never imagined needing the services of a criminal defense attorney. Being arrested and taken from my yard over an alleged Class C Misdemeanor as an innocent person, particularly a woman, was terrifying and traumatizing. Having lost trust in the system, we decided to hire an attorney. Ronnie listened patiently, provided assurance, and mobilized quickly. Thanks to his swift and knowledgeable work, my case was dismissed the same day it reached the District Attorney’s desk. Ronnie then processed my expunction, which was expedited due to his familiarity with the Montgomery County system and the grace of the DA. While I am grateful the justice system worked as intended, I would strongly encourage others facing even misdemeanor charges in this county to hire an attorney, if it is possible. The system is complex and can be unfair - having Ronnie in our corner ensured my continued safety and the protection of my legal rights. I would highly recommend his services to anyone finding themselves in a similar situation. He is patient, methodical, effective, and experienced. You’ll be in good hands.

reviews.ownerResponse: We are aware that you did not get the result that you wanted; however, it was not possible. The information below is in the public domain, meaning it is not privileged. Our firm followed the rules and did the work needed to ask for a guardianship. Since a guardianship can only be obtained when specific conditions exist, the Court staff investigated your family’s circumstances. The investigator is also an attorney. The investigation report is a public report. After the Court investigator interviewed your father, the report concluded he did not need a guardianship. He may qualify for a guardianship in the future, but did not now. We wish you the best with your family circumstances.

I strongly advise against hiring this immigration lawyer. My family member experience was nothing short of a nightmare. From the beginning, communication was almost non-existent. Despite repeated promises to return calls or provide updates, I was constantly left in the dark — emails and voicemails went unanswered for days or even weeks.

They charged my family member thousands of dollars, and after all that, they submitted the wrong application on their behalf. Because of their error, their case was denied. Instead of taking responsibility, they had the audacity to ask for even more money to submit the correct application — something they should have done properly the first time.

This wasn’t just unprofessional; it was unethical. The lack of accountability and disregard for their client’s future is unacceptable. We regret ever trusting them with something so important.

Jess Bailey and her associates have done terrific work for me with agricultural as well as commercial real estate purchases. The first time I used her services was in 2017 when she helped me review the title work for a large tract of timber property near Huntsville. She assisted me again in the purchase of pasture property in Georgetown, Texas in 2018. Then in 2019, my wife and I purchased our first NNN property near Fort Worth, TX. She assisted us in reviewing the title and also the lease contract as well. During all three purchases, Jess Bailey and Julia were prompt, timely, and very courteous at all times. They helped all transactions move quickly and seamlessly. I plan to use the Bailey Law firm in future commercial real estate purchases, and I highly recommend her services to anyone else as well!

Kind, communicative, efficient, patient, supportive, thorough -- mere words could never fully express the depth of my gratitude for Rich Shea and for what he has done for our family.  I fought the system alone for years to get my severely disabled mother the hands-on, round-the-clock, fully staffed care she needed and deserved.  I had to leave a 20-year career in a profession I loved to become her full-time caregiver, even when it was painfully obvious that I alone could never provide the level of care she needed.  After being led astray many times by people in the medical care industry, Rich Shea picked us up, dusted us off, and with one foot in front of the other showed us the light at the end of the tunnel.  Thank you, thank you, thank you to The Shea Law Firm.
Mr. Shea handled our Medicaid claim for my wife in a very professional and expedient manner. I highly recommend him for your attorney needs.

My uncle has no immediate family and due to age and illness, he's not able to care for himself.  I was needing to get him qualified for Medicaid.  As I began to research qualifying him for Medicaid, I realized I was lost in the bureaucracy and red tape.  I found Mr. Shea and was impressed with his professionalism and willingness to help.  Mr. Shea answered my questions and assured me that this will all work out.   That assurance gave me the peace of mind I was needing and knew he was taking care of my uncle.  Thank you Mr. Shea for being a blessing to my family.

Mr. Shea was an answer to so many prayers! I live out of state and was needing legal assistance for my elderly parent located in Houston. I was concerned that navigating this process from afar would be difficult, but Mr. Shea’s communication was timely, thorough, and always reassuring. He was patient in answering my many questions and never made me feel like a burden or irritation. He kept me informed throughout the entire process and never left me wondering what was happening or why. He clearly is an expert in the field and knows from experience exactly how to handle the manipulative tactics of Medicaid. We would have most certainly given up our pursuit (and a significant sum of money we were rightfully entitled to) if we had tried to navigate Medicaid qualification on our own. My only regret is that we didn’t find him sooner. His cost was very fair, and I appreciate that it was all-encompassing with no hidden fees. Overall, Mr. Shea was an absolute dream to work with—a complete 180 from the nightmare experience we had previously with another elder law attorney in Spring. I am already recommending Mr. Shea to friends and give him my strongest endorsement!!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for sharing your experience. Helping families navigate Medicaid from out of state is something I do often, and I know how stressful it can be when you're trying to help a parent from hundreds of miles away. I'm so glad we could make that process smoother for you.

You're absolutely right that nursing home Medicaid can be tricky to navigate alone. They have their procedures and timelines, and knowing how to work within their system makes all the difference. I'm grateful we could help you get what your family was entitled to and that you didn't have to give up that pursuit.

Thank you for the recommendation and for trusting me with something so important to your family. That means everything to my practice here in The Woodlands.

reviews.text: Mr. Shea was wonderful from the very first call.  He helped me sort out what I needed for my mom and how to go about getting everything!  He explains it all so that you can understand!  I would highly recommend him if you are in need of a lawyer.  Thank you so much!!!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience. It means the world to me to know that I was able to help you navigate a complicated legal process for your mom and make what can feel overwhelming seem more manageable.

My wife and I recently engaged Knighton & Stone to update our overall estate plan. Jay is extremely knowledgeable and a gifted communicator. First, he took the time to listen and fully understand our circumstances and intentions. After preparing the draft documents, Jay was very responsive to our follow-up questions to which he provided detailed answers.
Jay's administrative team is also quite competent, efficient and client-oriented. They made the whole process quite easy -- even filing paperwork to transfer property deeds to the trust.
Our experience with Knighton & Stone was head and shoulders above our experiences with other estate planning attorneys in The Woodlands over the past twenty years.
FIVE BIG GOLD STARS!

Most importantly, I felt truly heard and respected throughout the entire process. They approached my situation with care and sensitivity, tailoring the plan to reflect our values and wishes for the future.

I highly recommend Knighton and Stone law firm to anyone seeking expert guidance and personalized service in estate planning. They’ve given me peace of mind, and I’m grateful for their excellent service.

reviews.text: I had been searching for a traffic attorney to take care of a speeding ticket I had received in Montgomery, TX late last year. I haven’t had any tickets in over a decade so I definitely did not want any hitting my record to affect my insurance rates. I found Todd Lehn’s office and saw the excellent reviews he has. It is to no surprise how he has built such an outstanding reputation. I spoke to him upon the initial consult, a second time when I had officially hired him and the third and final time I received notification from his office that the matter had been resolved in a MUCH more favorable manner than I was originally prepared for. God forbid I ever need his services again, I will absolutely be using him and I would highly suggest anyone else to do the same. The cost to hire him is offset by the saved insurance premiums from letting a ticket hit your record. Thank you Todd Lehn and team! Y’all were amazing!
reviews.ownerResponse: Tyler, thanks for taking the time to leave such a great review!  -- Todd

reviews.text:
I had a hard time finding a lawyer who serviced Splendora, TX, but after two days of calling what felt like a million places, I was finally referred to Todd Lehn... and I’m so glad I was! From the very first phone call, he immediately put me at ease. He was honest, explained every step of the process, and made sure I knew what to expect over the next few months.

Making my payment online was quick and easy. I didn’t even have to take time off work. He went to court on my behalf and came back with a great outcome. If you’re looking for a reliable, professional traffic ticket lawyer who serves the entire Houston area, he’s your guy!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks, Tai!  Not many lawyers want to deal with Splendora, but we are here to help!  I appreciate the kind review!  -- Todd
